CVE-2012-0881.title: Apache Xerces2 Java Parser before 2.12.0 allows remote attackers  ...
CVE-2012-0881.description: Apache Xerces2 Java Parser before 2.12.0 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (CPU consumption) via a crafted message to an XML service, which triggers hash table collisions.

CVE-2022-23437.title: There's a vulnerability within the Apache Xerces Java (XercesJ) X ...
CVE-2022-23437.description: There's a vulnerability within the Apache Xerces Java (XercesJ) XML parser when handling specially crafted XML document payloads. This causes, the XercesJ XML parser to wait in an infinite loop, which may sometimes consume system resources for prolonged duration. This vulnerability is present within XercesJ version 2.12.1 and the previous versions.
